message:
fix(convoy): propagate owned flag and fix late direct-merge fallback (gt-7b6wf)

Two bugs prevented merge=direct from working reliably:

1. getConvoyInfoFromIssue never set the Owned field on ConvoyInfo, so
   the IsOwnedDirect() fallback check in done.go always returned false.
   Fix: store convoy_owned as an attachment field alongside convoy_id
   and merge_strategy, and read it back in getConvoyInfoFromIssue.

2. The fallback direct-merge check in done.go (after push) claimed
   "polecat already pushed to main" but the branch was actually pushed
   to origin/<feature-branch>. Fix: the fallback now does the actual
   direct push to main before skipping MR creation, and falls through
   to normal MR path if the direct push fails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
